creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
Please accept the following port:

	p5-Catalyst-Plugin-FormBuilder
	
	for inclusion into the FreeBSD ports collection.

	Attached is also a port for the required p5-CGI-FormBuilder

Fix: 

--- p5-Catalyst-Plugin-FormBuilder.shar ends here -----rsGVf52Q4FdRr6fdYv5fQDU93sqT9Y3Zz2UzXAS0UvqmYxBK
Content-Type: text/plain; name="p5-CGI-FormBuilder.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="p5-CGI-FormBuilder.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-CGI-FormBuilder
#	p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile
#	p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo
#	p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist
#	p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr
#
echo c - p5-CGI-FormBuilder
mkdir -p p5-CGI-FormBuilder > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder
X# Date created:				14 Sep 2006
X# Whom:					Fernan Aguero
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	CGI-FormBuilder
XPORTVERSION=	3.0401
XCATEGORIES=	www perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	../by-authors/id/N/NW/NWIGER
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X
XMAINTAINER=	fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
XCOMMENT=	FormBuilder for CGI
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XOPTIONS=	TT		"Template Toolkit support" on \
X		HTML_TEMPLATE	"HTML::Template support" off \
X		TEXT_TEMPLATE	"Text::Template support" off \
X		CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE "CGI::FastTemplate support" off
X
XMAN3=	CGI::FormBuilder.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Builtin.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::HTML.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Source::File.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Multi.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::TT2.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Test.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Util.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Text.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Source.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Field.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Fast.3 \
X	CGI::FormBuilder::Messages.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if ${PERL_LEVEL} <= 500503
XIGNORE=	requires Perl 5.6. Install lang/perl5 or lang/perl5.8, and try again
X.endif
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_TT)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+=	${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/Template.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_HTML_TEMPLATE)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+= ${SITE_PERL}/HTML/Template.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Template
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_TEXT_TEMPLATE)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+= ${SITE_PERL}/Text/Template.pm:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-Template
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE)
XBUILD_DEPENDS+= ${SITE_PERL}/CGI/FastTemplate.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-FastTemplate
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile
echo x - p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo'
XMD5 (CGI-FormBuilder-3.0401.tgz) = 4be7ab21c7df668f9144def961c40f55
XSHA256 (CGI-FormBuilder-3.0401.tgz) = fdd08800f6b871abfb743b22c038d66c8a5fc429121d983f4de38aa55d1c67bc
XSIZE (CGI-FormBuilder-3.0401.tgz) = 145489
END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo
echo x - p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist'

X%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Template/HTML.pm

X%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Messages/en_US.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Messages/de_DE.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Messages/ja_JP.pm

X@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CGI/FormBuilder
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CGI
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%
X@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Field
X@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Template
X@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Messages

END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist
echo x - p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr'
XCGI::FormBuilder - Easily generate and process stateful forms
X
XThe goal of CGI::FormBuilder (FormBuilder) is to provide an easy way
Xfor you to generate and process entire CGI form-based applications.
XIts main features are:
X
X* Field Abstraction
X
X  Viewing fields as entities (instead of just params), where the HTML
X  representation, CGI values, validation, and so on are properties of
X  each field.
X
X* DWIMmery
X
X  Lots of built-in "intelligence" (such as automatic field typing),
X  giving you about a 4:1 ratio of the code it generates versus what
X  you have to write.
X
X* Built-in Validation
X
X  Full-blown regex validation for fields, even including JavaScript
X  code generation.
X
X* Template Support
X
X  Pluggable support for external template engines, such as
X  HTML::Template, Text::Template, Template Toolkit, and
X  CGI::FastTemplate.
X
XPlus, the native HTML generated is valid XHTML 1.0 Transitional.
X
XWWW: http://www.formbuilder.org
END-of-p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr
exit
